title: Item Schema
description: Schema for defining items in Dungeon Crawler World.

skills.description: A dictionary of skills and values associated with the item.
skills.$comment: Each skill should match an existing skill in the skills folder.

spells.description: A dictionary of spells and values associated with the item.
spells.$comment: Each spell should match an existing spell in the spells folder.

equippable.description: Is this item able to be equipped.

benefits.description: A dictionary of benefits associated with the item.
benefits.$comment: Each benefit should match an existing benefit in the benefits folder.
